calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Dec-18-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:25 am
Judge Pro Tem Robert Stumpf, clerk - Leslie Gomez, nothing on record, dept. 525.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Leon Igudesman appears in pro per, no appearance made by the respondent. Party, previously sworn, testifies in the narrative and responds to questions by Judge Stumpf.

Mr. Igudesman presents an email and letter from respondent indicating the wish to dismiss. The Judge reads it and returns it to Mr. Igudesman.

A dismissal will be issued.

9:27 am

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Dec-01-2009 Continued To Dec-17-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525

Off Calendar Oct-14-2009 Judgment Entered
